nasb.text: The men of Israel said to the Hivites, “Perhaps you are living within our land; how then shall we make a covenant with you?”

esv.text: But the men of Israel said to the Hivites, “Perhaps you live among us; then how can we make a covenant with you?”

cnv.text: 以色列人對這些希未人說：“你們也許是這地的居民，若是這樣，我們怎樣和你們立約呢？”

ccb.text: 以色列人对这些希未人说：“你们也许就住在附近。我们怎么能跟你们缔结盟约呢？”
